evals.prompt: /m_code-architecture-improvement Review src/orders and propose better boundaries. Do not edit yet.
evals.expected_output: Produces evidence-based assessment, minimal target shape, migration plan, validation evidence, and risks.
assertions: Does not force Clean Architecture mechanically.

evals.prompt: /m_code-architecture-improvement Make one small architecture improvement in src/auth for testability.
evals.expected_output: Makes one justified small patch, adds/uses tests, introduces a seam or extracts pure logic, and reports validation.
assertions: Change improves testability, coupling, cohesion, or dependency direction.
